summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuildMap iteration 5 features: Advanced AI system integration, ZIP export, enhanced analysis endpoint. All backend APIs working (13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend Vibe Coding UI fully functional with all new features visible.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ root endpoint returns version 2.0.0
Backend API /api/auth/login with test credentials test@buildmap.com / test123456
Backend API /api/auth/me returns user info with cookies
Backend API /api/projects returns list of user projects
Backend API /api/projects/{id}/analysis returns enhanced analysis with complexity, suggested_skills, verification, user_type fields
Backend API /api/projects/{id}/export returns 404 when no outputs exist
Frontend loads landing page correctly with Arabic RTL
Frontend login flow works with test credentials
Frontend dashboard shows projects list after login
Frontend project page loads with chat interface, progress bar, and side panel
Frontend side panel shows advanced analysis data (complexity: بسيط, skills: تصميم الـ API/أنماط الواجهة الأمامية/أنماط الخادم الخلفي, verification status)
Frontend progress bar shows 5 stages (فهم الفكرة، الفئة المستهدفة، المشكلة والحل، الميزات، المتطلبات التقنية)
Frontend quick suggestions visible and functional
Frontend files preview placeholder shown when no outputs exist
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warning in ProjectPage.js: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchProjectData' - low priority

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped - no projects with outputs to test ZIP download)

seed_data_creation: Test user test@buildmap.com already exists with projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 5 are working: 1) ai_system.py is properly integrated into server.py for enhanced analysis endpoint, 2) ZIP export endpoint returns 404 correctly when no outputs exist, 3) Frontend side panel displays complexity, suggested_skills, and verification data from the AI system. To test ZIP export with actual content, generate outputs first using the /api/projects/{id}/generate endpoint (requires OpenRouter API key).

zip_export_endpoint.error_message_arabic: لم يتم توليد المخرجات بعد، ابدأ محادثة مع المساعد أولاً
